1:
Desperate to have Tataramu back at work on the <Emphasis>Dezul Qualan</Emphasis>, Sezul has asked that you approach a member of Highwind Skyways directly. Head to the airship landing in Gridania, and find a Skyways employee who might know of Tataramu's present whereabouts.

※Please note that the difficulty of this quest has been synced to your current level.
